title: ctenitis squamigera
intro: Ctenitis squamigera, also known as the scaly polypody, is a species of fern native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Ctenitis squamigera include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Ctenitis squamigera can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as tea, infusion, and tincture, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
